chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ تَكَلَّمَ فِي صَلَاتِهِ أَوِ انْصَرَفَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُتِمَّهَا أَوْ يَقُومُ فِي مَوْضِعِ الْجُلُوسِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 42 – The one who speaks during his Salāt, or leaves before he completes it, or stands in place of the sitting

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/204)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/204)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَتَكَلَّمُ نَاسِياً فِي الصَّلَاةِ يَقُولُ أَقِيمُوا صُفُوفَكُمْ فَقَالَ يُتِمُّ صَلَاتَهُ ثُمَّ يَسْجُدُ سَجْدَتَيْنِ فَقُلْتُ سَجْدَتَا السَّهْوِ قَبْلَ التَّسْلِيمِ هُمَا أَوْ بَعْدُ قَالَ بَعْدُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, and Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, altogether from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Abdul Rajman Bin Al Hajjaj who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the man who talks forgetfully during the Salāt saying, ‘Straighten your rows!’ So heasws said: ‘He should complete his Salāt, then he should perform Sajdah with two Sujūd’. So I said, ‘The two Sujūd for the omission, are these two before or after the offering Salām?’ Heasws said: ‘After’.
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il from al- Fadl ibn Shadhan all from Safwan ibn Yahya from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Hajjaj who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who speaks because of forgetfulness in Salah (prayer) saying, ‘Straighten your rows? He (the Imam) said, ‘He completes his Salah (prayer), then performs two Sajdah (prostration)? I then asked, ‘Are the two Sajdah (prostration) because of mistake after or before Salam (the phrase of offering greeting of peace)?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘It is afterward?”
